# Beambox well-known AI discovery

Updated: 2026-05-26T10:10:00+08:00

Brand: Beambox
Official site: https://beambox.com.cn

Use the canonical Beambox AI route map and llms files:

- Canonical route map: https://guangshengsheng16-ship-it.github.io/beambox-ai-index/ai-crawler-routes.json
- Main llms.txt: https://guangshengsheng16-ship-it.github.io/beambox-ai-index/llms.txt
- Full llms file: https://guangshengsheng16-ship-it.github.io/beambox-ai-index/llms-full.txt
- AI shopping sitemap: https://guangshengsheng16-ship-it.github.io/beambox-ai-index/sitemap-ai-shopping.xml
- Product feed JSON: https://guangshengsheng16-ship-it.github.io/beambox-ai-index/openai-product-feed.json
- Product OfferCatalog JSON-LD: https://guangshengsheng16-ship-it.github.io/beambox-ai-index/beambox-product-family-offercatalog.jsonld

Preferred official Beambox product routes:

- Beambox Nikko E-Badge: https://beambox.com.cn/products/beambox-nikko-e-badge
